decision_records.title: Organic Pathway Expert-Dominant
decision_records.summary: 4 analyzed co-located PAH+PCB station-events (3 with detected PCBs), covering 1 of 9 parent configurations. All from ALCAN Kitimat. Organic pathway remains expert-dominant.
decision_records.rationale: PCBs not routinely analyzed in BC sediment assessments. Only ALCAN yielded co-located PAH+PCB data (4 stations, single contamination profile). 8/9 parent configurations remain unobserved.
decision_records.impact: Organic pathway CPTs (organic_contamination, organic_bioavail) remain expert-dominant. Noisy-OR Tier 1 threshold (n>=5 per config) not met; CPTs fall back to expert prior.
decision_records.reopen_criteria: >=10 co-located PAH+PCB measurements from >=2 sites, >=3/9 parent configurations, LOO validation gate.

decision_records.title: Woodfibre Level C Cross-Year Merge
decision_records.summary: 8 Woodfibre stations approved for cross-year merge (2006 chemistry + 2014 toxicity/community). 3 stations rejected (post-dredging contamination profile change).
decision_records.rationale: Stations SED06-103/104/105/111/114/116/118/119 had consistent contamination profiles across 2006-2014. Stations SED06-113/115/117 showed post-dredging changes.
decision_records.impact: Adds 8 effective training triads (36 native -> 44 effective). Rejected stations retained in DB for single-LoE reference.

decision_records.title: Dataset Freeze
decision_records.summary: Dataset frozen at 44 full triads / 82 co-located from 8 sites. Performance plateau confirmed: +19 stations (n=63->82). v4.0 accuracy 0.549, kappa 0.180.
decision_records.rationale: Learning curve plateaued. Bottleneck is expert prior shape (25/57 low-risk FP in v4.0) and config diversity (Tier 3 at 1/9 configs), not data volume.
decision_records.impact: No further BC site extraction. Next phase is model architecture work (expert prior shape investigation) or regulatory application.
decision_records.reopen_criteria: Novel contamination profile site identified, or expert prior recalibration unlocks accuracy gains benefiting from additional data.

known_limitations.title: Moderate recall = 0.125
known_limitations.description: Only 8/82 co-located samples are moderate-risk. v4.0 recall improved to 12.5% (1/8) from 0% (v3). Still a structural limitation.
known_limitations.mitigation: Acceptable for screening tool (moderate predicted as high = conservative). Not suitable for balanced classification.

known_limitations.title: Organic pathway expert-dominant
known_limitations.description: 4 analyzed co-located PAH+PCB station-events (3 with detected PCBs), covering 1 of 9 parent configurations. All from ALCAN — expert-dominant, not entirely expert-elicited.
known_limitations.mitigation: Metal pathway claims are in-scope (49 BDeu obs across 12/36 configs). Organic pathway claims are out-of-scope for data-supported inference.

known_limitations.title: Conservative over-prediction (FP rate ~44%)
known_limitations.description: 25/57 low-risk stations predicted as high-risk (v4.0, reduced from 28/57 in v3). Systematic conservative bias from expert prior shape.
known_limitations.mitigation: Acceptable for regulatory screening (false positive = conservative). High recall (70.6%) means true high-risk sites are rarely missed.

known_limitations.title: Performance plateau
known_limitations.description: Adding 19 stations (n=63->82) produced v4.0 accuracy 0.549, kappa 0.180 (up from v3 0.427/0.033). Learning curve has plateaued at current architecture.
known_limitations.mitigation: Bottleneck is prior shape and config diversity, not data volume. Dataset frozen (DR-003).

known_limitations.title: BC-only geographic scope
known_limitations.description: All 8 training sites are in British Columbia. Model applicability to other jurisdictions is unvalidated.
known_limitations.mitigation: Intended use is BC contaminated sites regulatory screening only.

known_limitations.title: Tier 3 config diversity (1/9)
known_limitations.description: Effect nodes (tox_amphipod, taxa_richness) observe only 1 of 9 possible parent configurations. Limits generalization.
known_limitations.mitigation: Expert priors fill unobserved configurations. Additional config diversity requires novel contamination profiles.

issue_summary.note: See BNRRM_HANDOFF.md Active Issues table for full details.
